mapper.select: SELECT g.id AS groupId, g.group_no AS groupNo, g.group_name AS groupName, g.owner_user_id AS ownerUserId, g.avatar_url AS avatarUrl, g.notice AS notice, g.status AS status, gm.role AS myRole, c.conversation_type AS conversationType, CASE WHEN c.conversation_type = 3 THEN COALESCE(gm.role = 1, FALSE) ELSE TRUE END AS canSend, ( SELECT COUNT(1) FROM im_group_member active_gm WHERE active_gm.group_id = g.id AND active_gm.status = 1 ) AS memberCount FROM im_group g JOIN im_group_member gm ON gm.group_id = g.id LEFT JOIN im_conversation c ON c.biz_id = g.id AND c.conversation_type IN (2, 3) AND c.status = 1 WHERE g.id = #{groupId} AND gm.user_id = #{userId} AND gm.status = 1 AND g.status = 1 LIMIT 1
